name: Zen Splatter
author: Poki
description: Zen Splatter is a coloring game that invites you to sit back and relax. Select from a variety of objects that resonate with you, then splash your favorite colors across them. Take your time to rotate each object, ensuring every corner is covered in vibrant hues. With over 20 objects to choose from, let your creativity flow. Can you create something truly beautiful and serene? How to play Zen Splatter? Left click to paint, right click and hold to rotate the object. Who created Zen Splatter? Zen Splatter is created by Kelly Ray J. Play their other games on Poki : Chicken Sword: Ninja Master , RoyaleBall.io , Space Ballz , Merge Party , and Hole N' Fun ! How can I play Zen Splatter for free? You can play Zen Splatter for free on Poki. Can I play Zen Splatter on mobile devices and desktop? Zen Splatter can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
